creative_direction.reasoning: Collage of 4-5 layered photographs (founder portrait, product shots, brand artwork) at slight angles with subtle shadow — paper-cutout moodboard aesthetic. Image-gen produces the multi-layer collage; quote + attribution + Shopify logo composite in post.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Paper-cutout collage of a Black founder (Olajuwon Ajanaku / Eastside Golf) and his brand work, with a 'right way' testimonial overlay.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full bake including quote + attribution + logo.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 light-gray editorial collage: top third holds a sans-serif pull-quote with attribution; middle two-thirds holds a collage of 4-5 overlapping photographs at slight angles — the HERO image is Olajuwon Ajanaku (a Black man in a varsity letterman jacket and ballcap, smiling, holding up a lavender purple sweatshirt featuring Eastside Golf's Black golfer illustration). Supporting collage images: a line-art illustration of a Black golfer figure mid-swing, a product shot of hangers with brown labels, a founder portrait in a crowd. Bottom-right: Shopify logo.

camera.style: editorial collage mixing photograph tiles and illustration tiles

lighting.style: subtle warm studio / natural on each tile

vertical_zones: Top 5-18%: quote pull-quote + attribution, left-aligned, editorial sans
Middle 20-85%: collage of 4-5 layered image tiles (slight overlap, tilt ±5°, subtle paper shadow)
collage_layers: HERO (center, largest ~45% of canvas width): Olajuwon portrait holding lavender sweatshirt
Behind-left tile: black-on-green line-art illustration panel of a Black golfer mid-swing
Behind-right tile: lavender hanging hangers with brown product tags
Small inset tile bottom-left: Black man in cap in a crowd (founder in audience, candid)
Small inset tile upper-right: a yellowish product/brand graphic framed

style_directives: moodboard / pinboard energy, not designed ad
each tile has slight drop shadow implying physical paper cutout
imperfect tile angles (±5°), some tiles overlap at edges

text_elements_in_image.content:
"If you're doing it the right
way, you're on Shopify."
text_elements_in_image.font: Editorial sans (Shopify Sans Regular or Inter Regular)
Sans Bold for name, Regular for title

negative_prompt: no clean seamless backgrounds inside tiles (keep them photo-realistic or illustration-realistic)
no drop shadows on typography (only on tiles)
no over-polished portrait — Olajuwon should read as candid/real

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate the collage + hero portrait. Quote, attribution, and Shopify logo composite in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 light warm gray (#EDEDED) canvas. Middle 20-85%: collage of 4-5 layered image tiles at ±5° tilts with subtle paper-drop shadows. HERO tile (center, ~45% canvas width): a Black man in his 30s in a navy varsity letterman jacket with cream leather arms and a black ballcap, smiling, holding up a lavender purple sweatshirt that features a Black illustrated golfer figure on the front. Behind-left tile: green (#52A868) rectangle containing a black line-art illustration of a Black golfer mid-swing with a club. Behind-right tile: photograph of lavender/cream clothes on hangers with brown product tags. Small bottom-left tile: candid photograph of a Black man in a cap in a crowd. Small upper-right tile: framed product graphic. Top 18% and bottom 10% are empty light-gray space.

camera.style: editorial moodboard — each tile lit individually

elements.content: "If you're doing it the right way, you're on Shopify."

assets.name: Eastside Golf brand artwork (Black golfer illustration)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Line-art illustration of a Black golfer figure mid-swing, black ink on flat solid green (#52A868) background panel.

patterns_exemplified: C2 show customer's work, not your product
DP-1 proprietary illustration (Eastside Golf's own art)
prompt_writer_training_notes: Collage tile count matters (4-5 is sweet spot — fewer feels flat, more feels chaotic). Always specify slight tilt angle (±5°) and subtle paper-drop shadow on tiles. Hero-tile-plus-smaller-tiles is the correct hierarchy — if all tiles equal size, concept fails. Light warm gray canvas (#EDEDED) is deliberate — pure white reads corporate, cream reads DTC. Casting Olajuwon in varsity jacket is specific — 'varsity letterman jacket' phrase is distinct visual reference.
